text: Science has a clearer story about radio astronomy than social media does. Radio astronomy studies celestial objects through the radio waves they emit, revealing secrets light cannot. Imagine detecting a star's heartbeat from millions of light-years away, just by tuning into its radio signals. This technology has unlocked the mysteries of black holes, pulsars, and even the cosmic microwave background. Yet, each discovery raises new questions, reminding us how much we have yet to learn. Curious about the universe? Follow for more mind-blowing space facts!
